description_long: This hamburger features a soft, rounded sesame seed bun with a light golden-brown color and scattered sesame seeds on top. The interior reveals a thick beef patty layered with a slice of yellow cheese that slightly melts over the edges. Crisp green lettuce, slices of tomato, and visible white onion strips are arranged above the patty, adding vibrant color and texture. The cheese is positioned both above and below the patty, with the lower slice peeking out from the bottom bun. The toppings are distributed evenly, giving the burger a balanced and appetizing appearance. The overall look is fresh and classic, reminiscent of a typical cheeseburger found in urban eateries or food trucks.
description: A classic hamburger with a sesame seed bun, beef patty, cheese, lettuce, tomato, and onions, all layered for a fresh and appetizing look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sesame seed bun, lettuce, tomato, onions, cheese, and patty clearly layered and slightly protruding from the sides.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the lettuce and cheese spilling out more prominently, with the patty and bun still visible.
description_view_2: The view emphasizes the lettuce and cheese, with less visibility of the tomato and onions, and the patty mostly covered.
description_view_3: This side shows the tomato slice more clearly, with lettuce and cheese visible, and the patty peeking out from beneath the toppings.
attribute_topping_arrangement: Lettuce, tomato, onions, and cheese are layered above and below the beef patty, with toppings distributed evenly and some ingredients protruding from the sides.
